title: podman machine: disable zincati update service
body:
As explained in #21022, there are all kinds of downsides to a machine updating itself (via zincati) automatically, like interuption of service, lost mounts, etc.

disabling zincati will at least allow stop these downsides.  we are likely to contemplate if podman will take over the update process externally where interuption of services will not occur etc.

Fixes #20122

```release-note
Disable auto-updates in podman machine vms that use FCOS
```

How are machines updated then? Leaving machines on old versions seems like a bad idea. At the very least these expectations should be documented somewhere if the user is responsible for updating the VM manually and how to do so. And you need to remove the auto update from the docs: https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/87dd939334c903748b3f370600efccb0904c0e89/docs/source/markdown/podman-machine-init.1.md.in#L27-L30
